feedback.text: Hi! First of all I want to say thank you for your quickness in the digital fairness act in this evolving world where everyday a new thing comes up that changes people's lives. My first feedback is streaming platforms and digital game stores and publishers these days are acting like when they sell us a product they'll actively hide the fact they did not sell that particular product but instead they gave us a permission license to use the product but you will never see this in the shopping page of that product ( for example a game called the crew cancelled that I've been playing time to time just because publisher did not want to pay for the serves costs which is understandable but the problem is they completely remove the game from my account and I will never be able to play that game again. If there were a system like end of life plan for these type of situation where players can play it offline or rent a server to play with my friends would be much appreciated but these companies have no incentives because they just want to sell their newer, more expensive products to me. My second example would be streaming platforms like Netflix which let's say you subscribed to their platform for a specific show that you enjoy and all of a sudden for some reason they can just remove the show remove it from your library even if you download it and have no consequences for their action like they could have at least make a announcement like hey we are going to remove this show you can download it until this date! Something like this would go a long way. Another example is shopping sites like Amazon have their unsubscribe button hidden in the depths of the app and it automatically saves our credit card information and does not even ask for 3d security. Sadly especially in my country our id cards, social security numbers our addresses etc. Have been stolen by hackers and our government is functionless to say the least. I believe there should be a strict ban for shopping websites like Amazon Trendyol Hepsiburada to not save any personal information because these hackers already got my address already got my id number on top of that if they get my credit card what I can i do to stop an ill willed person to call my bank and just withdraw my money or use my credit card ( especially these times where there's ai voice copy programs). I believe these companies hold too much information just to make our purchase process quicker so consumer wouldn't think anymore than couple minutes to purchase something and that is like putting casino machines in front of a gambling addict. I believe there are many more issues which I am sure don't even know about, in this day and age only country/organization in the whole world that's putting people first instead of profit is the European union in this AI filled world I hope you don't get corrupted like our country or america,Russia and china monopoly is not a good thing and you are the doing the best way to manage something. Being a united force. Whoever reads this have an awesome day hopefully you get my message and please help to STOP KILLING GAMES initiative by forcing these companies to make some changes about how they view the games because lower income people like me sometimes have only one enjoyment in their life and that is being taken away just some more money like they don't have enough of it already...
